description: This pipeline appears to be designed for converting region of interest lists into masks without requiring a reference image, allowing for flexible output sizing.

ed0d9cc7-680f-44d3-9dc6-67b08bdc5230.name: ij1-roi-to-mask-unreferenced
ed0d9cc7-680f-44d3-9dc6-67b08bdc5230.description: Converts ROI lists to masks. This algorithm does not need a reference image that determines the output size.
